Investment Strategy
The scheme seeks to generate long-term capital appreciation by creating a portfolio that is invested predominantly in Equity and Equity related securities of companies engaged in commodity and commodity related sectors. Suitability
Such thematic funds are avoidable for most investors because:
    * They have a narrow investment focus
    * Instead, diversified equity funds which invest across sectors/themes are better

If you still choose to invest:
    * Invest only through SIP
    * Have a 7+ year investment horizon
    * Be prepared to withstand interim sharp declines in investment value

Capital Gains Taxation
    * If the mutual fund units are sold after 1 year from the date of investment, gains upto Rs 1.25 lakh in a financial year are exempt from tax. Gains over Rs 1.25 lakh are taxed at the rate of 12.5%.
 ... 
Subscribers of Value Research Fund Advisor can conveniently invest in the low-cost direct plan of ICICI Prudential Commodities Fund through the Value Research Fund Advisor website. Alternatively, mutual funds can also be purchased directly from the respective fund house’s website. For example, ICICI Prudential Commodities Fund can be bought from the ICICI Prudential Mutual Fund website. In such a case, if you are investing in multiple funds from different fund houses, you will need to transact separately on each fund house’s website. The third option is to invest offline, by seeking assistance from a mutual fund distributor. results.title: ICICI Prudential Commodities Fund Direct Growth - NAV, Mutual Fund Performance & Portfolio
excerpts:
Section Title: ... > ### About ICICI Prudential Commodities Fund Direct Growth
Content:
ICICI Prudential Commodities Fund Direct Growth is a Equity Mutual Fund Scheme launched by ICICI Prudential Mutual Fund. This scheme was made available to investors on 12 Oct 1993. Lalit Kumar is the Current Fund Manager of ICICI Prudential Commodities Fund Direct Growth fund. The fund currently has an Asset Under Management(AUM) of ₹10,24,916 Cr and the Latest NAV as of 10 Apr 2026 is ₹50.14.
The ICICI Prudential Commodities Fund Direct Growth is rated Very High risk. Minimum SIP Investment is set to ₹100. Minimum Lumpsum Investment is ₹5,000. Exit load of 1% if redeemed within 3 months.
;
Section Title: ICICI Prudential Commodities Fund Direct Growth > ... > Investment Objective
Content:
The scheme seeks to generate long-term capital appreciation by creating a portfolio that is invested predominantly in Equity and Equity related securities of companies engaged in commodity and commodity related sectors.
Fund benchmark NIFTY Commodities Total Return Index
[Scheme Information Document(SID)](https://www.icicipruamc.com)
